SyncCollections.SyncSql: SELECT CardCode as Id, CardName as Content, CardType FROM OCRD WHERE UpdateDate >= (select convert(date, LastSyncTime) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='OCRD')
SyncCollections.UpdateTrackerSql: NOT USED NOW - UPDATE Vector_SyncTracker SET LastSyncTime = @currentSync WHERE CollectionName='OCRD'

SyncCollections.SyncSql: SELECT ItemCode as Id, ItemName as Content FROM OITM WHERE UpdateDate >= (select convert(date, LastSyncTime) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='OITM')
SyncCollections.UpdateTrackerSql: NOT USED NOW - UPDATE Vector_SyncTracker SET LastSyncTime = @currentSync WHERE CollectionName='OITM'
